releaseNotes: Added requested Local Music file filters while keeping v6.0-style MediaStore scan
Music scan now requires SIZE > 500 KB
Music scan now requires DURATION >= 60 sec
Music scan now allows MIME types audio/mpeg, audio/mp4, audio/aac and audio/flac
Added requested Video file filters while keeping v6.0-style MediaStore scan
Video scan now requires SIZE > 500 KB
Video scan now requires DURATION >= 60 sec
Video scan now allows MIME types video/mp4, video/x-m4v, video/quicktime and video/webm
Note: Video MediaStore does not use IS_MUSIC because IS_MUSIC is an audio-only column
